headline: 2 Profitable Stocks with Impressive Fundamentals and 1 We Brush Off
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

raw.headline: 2 Profitable Stocks with Impressive Fundamentals and 1 We Brush Off

headline: Piper Sandler Cuts PT on Kimberly-Clark Corporation (KMB) to $114 From $133 – Here’s Why
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) is one of the best ethical companies to invest in now according to Reddit. Piper Sandler cut the price target on Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) to $114 from $133 on March 13 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm told investors that the company’s Q1 top-line momentum is tracking in […]

headline: ETHISPHERE NAMES KIMBERLY-CLARK AS ONE OF THE 2026 WORLD'S MOST ETHICAL COMPANIES®
summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ: KMB), a global personal care leader, has been recognized as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices.
